calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-18-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Marta Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee

Petitioner: Sagrario Franquez-Anzaldo present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Spanish Interpreter: Curtis Draves
The petition for change of the minor's name is Denied without prejudice.
Minor's father submitter a letter opposing to the change.
